name: translat
description: Desktop shell foundation for the Translat application.

scripts.check:scaffold: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const paths=['AGENTS.md','docs/architecture/system-overview.md','docs/runbooks/local-setup.md','src/README.md','src/frontend/App.tsx','src/frontend/app/AppShell.tsx','src/frontend/hooks/useHealthcheck.ts','src/shared/desktop.ts','src-tauri/Cargo.toml','src-tauri/src/main.rs','src-tauri/src/commands/healthcheck.rs','src-tauri/src/error.rs','src-tauri/src/persistence/bootstrap.rs','src-tauri/src/persistence/migrations.rs','src-tauri/migrations/0001_initial_schema.sql','tests/README.md','.agents/skills/README.md','notion/README.md']; const missing=paths.filter(p=>!fs.existsSync(p)); if(missing.length){console.error('Missing required paths: '+missing.join(', ')); process.exit(1)} console.log('Foundation shell OK');"
scripts.check: npm run check:scaffold && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run check:desktop
scripts.test: npm run check && npm run test:desktop
